title: Stocks to buy or sell: Dharmesh Shah of ICICI Sec suggests buying Power Grid shares on 4 May
summary: Despite ongoing geopolitical tensions, Nifty 50 increased by 0.4% to 23,998. Broader market indices performed well. A consolidation phase is expected, and investors are advised to buy high-quality stocks. Monitoring geopolitical volatility will be essential as earnings season progresses.

title: Crypto is now mainstream. Investors of all ages are diving in.
summary: Charles Schwab’s recent announcement that it will allow investors to trade crypto directly on its platform is the latest sign it has become a mainstream investment.

title: Nvidia is losing ground as world's most valuable company, says report. Who can be the first to hit $6 trillion?
summary: Nvidia has held the title of the world's most valuable company, but Google parent Alphabet is closing in fast. Here is why the crown could change hands within weeks, according to Barron's.

title: Bank holidays next week: SBI, HDFC, others closed on these days between 4 and 10 May; check RBI calendar
summary: Private and public sector banks in India will be closed for two days between May 4 and 10, 2026. Customers can use online services for transactions during these periods.&nbsp;
